summary: Iteration 26 testing complete. All new features verified: Templates panel with 20 templates across 8 categories, Redact tool AI privacy (isRedacted elements excluded), Highlighter auto mode with 'Oto: Açık/Kapalı' toggle, Rütbe and Görevler separated into individual modals, Header rank badge 'Çırak' visible, Profile Edit modal with photo upload functionality.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 26 features verified working: (1) Templates panel opens via tool-templates button in toolbox, shows 8 categories (Temel, İş, Kariyer, Hukuki, Eğitim, Kişisel, Pazarlama, Yaratıcı) with 20 templates (cv, report, letter, invoice, presentation, meeting, proposal, contract, newsletter, recipe, projectplan, certificate, checklist, brainstorm, socialmedia, weeklyplan, swot, blogpost, eventflyer, blank). Clicking templates populates canvas with elements. (2) Redact tool privacy verified in getDocText() and getFullDocContent() - isRedacted elements filtered out or replaced with [REDACTED] marker. (3) Highlighter auto mode in Word Type panel - toggle button shows 'Oto: Açık/Kapalı', 6 color picker buttons available with data-testid='highlight-color-{color}', remove button present. (4) Rütbe and Görevler now separate buttons in Settings (data-testid='ranks-btn' and 'missions-btn') opening separate modals. (5) Header rank badge shows 'Çırak' next to ZET Mindshare text (data-testid='header-rank-badge'). (6) Profile Edit modal has photo preview (data-testid='profile-photo-preview'), file input (data-testid='profile-photo-input'), name input, disabled email, and Kaydet button. Backend POST /api/auth/profile-picture accepts base64 image_data.

features_tested.templates_tool: PASSED - Templates button in toolbox opens panel via data-testid='tool-templates'
features_tested.templates_panel: PASSED - Shows 8 categories with 20 templates, clicking template populates canvas
features_tested.template_cv: PASSED - CV template applies correctly showing NAME, CONTACT, EXPERIENCE, EDUCATION, SKILLS sections
features_tested.redact_privacy: PASSED - Code verified: getDocText() excludes isRedacted elements, getFullDocContent() returns [REDACTED] placeholder
features_tested.highlighter_auto_toggle: PASSED - Button shows 'Oto: Kapalı' -> click -> 'Oto: Açık' with yellow glow
features_tested.highlighter_colors: PASSED - 6 color buttons (yellow, green, cyan, pink, orange, red) + remove button
features_tested.ranks_button: PASSED - Separate 'Rütbe' button with gold color (#f59e0b)
features_tested.missions_button: PASSED - Separate 'Görevler' button with teal color (#4ca8ad)
features_tested.ranks_modal: PASSED - Title 'Rütbe' only, shows 6 ranks (Çırak, Kalfa, Usta, Uzman, Maestro, Efsane) with XP values, no missions section
features_tested.missions_modal: PASSED - Title 'Görevler' only, shows Aktif Görevler with 6 missions, no ranks list
features_tested.header_rank_badge: PASSED - 'Çırak' badge visible next to 'ZET Mindshare' text
features_tested.profile_photo_preview: PASSED - Image preview element with data-testid='profile-photo-preview'
features_tested.profile_photo_input: PASSED - File input element with data-testid='profile-photo-input'
features_tested.profile_picture_api: PASSED - POST /api/auth/profile-picture accepts image_data, returns picture_url

mocked_apis.google_drive: Google Drive file operations are MOCKED
